message:
chore(gitignore): cover beads repair/recovery artifacts, non-root dump.rdb, and /debug scratch

Several ephemeral patterns kept showing up as untracked during multi-agent
work in this repo. Group them into the existing beads/scratch/RDB sections:

Beads repair artifacts (grouped next to .beads_recovery/):
  .beads/recovery/          # unsuffixed recovery workspace
  .beads/recovery_*/        # timestamped recovery dirs
  .beads/*.bad_*            # beads.db*.bad_* corruption snapshots
  .beads/*.pre_rebuild_*    # pre-rebuild DB/WAL/SHM backups

Root scratch binaries (grouped next to /print_diffs, /run_oracle_diff):
  /debug                    # extensionless compiled debug binary
  /debug[0-9]*              # debug, debug2, debug17, … variants
  /debug.rs
  /debug[0-9]*.rs

Redis RDB dumps anywhere in tree, not just repo root:
  **/dump.rdb               # superset of the existing /dump.rdb rule

Context: fr-conformance scratch runs persist dump.rdb under
crates/fr-conformance/, which the previous /dump.rdb pattern did not catch.
Broadening to **/dump.rdb covers that without losing the intent — RDB dumps
are always transient.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -152,6 +152,10 @@ ubs_*.jsonl
 
 # Beads recovery artifacts
 .beads_recovery/
+.beads/recovery/
+.beads/recovery_*/
+.beads/*.bad_*
+.beads/*.pre_rebuild_*
 
 # Extensionless scratch output files
 /check_result_*
@@ -161,6 +165,13 @@ ubs_*.jsonl
 /print_diffs.rs
 /run_oracle_diff
 /run_oracle_diff.rs
+/debug
+/debug[0-9]*
+/debug.rs
+/debug[0-9]*.rs
+
+# Persisted Redis RDB dumps anywhere in the tree (not just repo root)
+**/dump.rdb
 
 # Golden-test `.actual` outputs (diff output of failing golden comparisons)
 **/tests/golden/*.actual
